text: The sparrow perched on the fence and began to sing at dawn.
She drove her sedan to the office every morning through heavy traffic.
The oak in the backyard has been growing for over a hundred years.
He picked up the hammer and began repairing the broken shelf.
The surgeon performed a delicate operation on the patient's heart valve.
She bought a bouquet of tulips from the flower market downtown.
The novel won several prestigious literary awards last year.
They served an excellent risotto at the Italian restaurant on Main Street.
The puppy chased its tail in circles around the living room.
Mercury is the closest planet to the Sun in our solar system.
